trending_videos.title: Scary Movie | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Marlon Wayans, Shawn Wayans, Anna Faris, Regina Hall
trending_videos.description:
We’re baaaaaack. Watch the official trailer for the new #ScaryMovie - only in theatres June 12. 

Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer (“Ghostface”), the Core Four are back in the killer’s crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe. Marlon Wayans (“Shorty”), Shawn Wayans (“Ray”), Anna Faris (“Cindy”), and Regina Hall (“Brenda”) reunite in Scary Movie alongside returning favorites and fresh faces to slash through reboots, remakes, requels, prequels, sequels, spin-offs, elevated horror, origin stories, anything with the word legacy in it, and every “final chapter” that absolutely isn’t final. Nothing is sacred. No trope survives. ​Every line gets crossed. The Wayans are back to cancel the Cancel Culture.

Connect with #ScaryMovie Online:
Website: https://www.scarymovie.film
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/scarymovie/
X: https://x.com/ScaryMovie
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ScaryMovie
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@scarymovie
Threads: https://

trending_videos.title: Apex Legends x Gundam Event Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Two Legendary universes collide as Gundam hits the Outlands March 10, bringing iconic weapons, Gundam-inspired cosmetics, and a reborn Broken Moon. Step into the endless waltz and fight with the power of a Gundam!

Get more info: https://www.ea.com/games/apex-legends/news/apex-gundam-event

Apex Legends™ is a free-to-play* battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation® 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Switch 2, and PC via EA App, Epic Games Store and Steam: http://x.ea.com/57366.

Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710
Follow us on X: https://twitter.com/playapex
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/
Follow us on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@playapex/

Credits:
Production Company: Electronic Arts, Respawn Entertainment, CG by Brunch Studio, Gameplay capture & edit by Dark Burn Creative
Sound Design and Mix: Respawn Entertainment & Mass

ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Final Trailer | Netflix
trending_videos.description:
See you on March 10th!

MORE INFO ON ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE:
Netflix’s epic high-seas pirate adventure, ONE PIECE, returns for Season 2—unleashing fiercer adversaries and the most perilous quests yet. Luffy and the Straw Hats set sail for the extraordinary Grand Line—a legendary stretch of sea where danger and wonder await at every turn. As they journey through this unpredictable realm in search of the world’s greatest treasure, they’ll encounter bizarre islands and a host of formidable new enemies.

ABOUT ONE PIECE:
Netflix’s live-action adaptation of ONE PIECE is based on Japan’s highest-selling manga series of all time by Eiichiro Oda, with over 100 volumes and 500M copies sold worldwide. The epic high-seas adventure follows Monkey D. Luffy on his quest to find the legendary fabled treasure, the ONE PIECE, and become King of the Pirates. trending_videos.title: SCARY MOVIE 6 Official Trailer (2026) Marlon Wayans
trending_videos.description:
The parody franchise returns in Scary Movie 6 (2026).

Watch the official trailer featuring Marlon Wayans as the iconic comedy series takes aim at modern horror films once again. Packed with outrageous satire, unexpected cameos, and classic slapstick chaos, the sixth installment revives one of the most recognizable parody brands in film.

🔥 Horror parody returns
🔥 Marlon Wayans back in action
🔥 2026 comedy sequel

Subscribe for more official movie trailers and upcoming 2026 releases.


A huge thank you to All of our Channel Members! 
Ya'll really do keep the lights on for us over here.

Enjoy advanced 4K Upscaling and HDR-10 mastering across future trailers. Stay tuned for more.

movieTrailers.description: Movie trailers, particularly for upcoming releases such as 'Scary Movie 6' and 'ONE PIECE: Season 2', are highly trending. These trailers are generating significant interest and views.
movieTrailers.actionableInsight: Consider creating content that reviews or analyzes upcoming movie releases, as this aligns with current viewer interests.

gamingContent.description: Gaming-related content, specifically event trailers like 'Apex Legends x Gundam', remains a strong trend. Live gaming sessions (e.g., 'ARC NUTTERS' livestream) are also gaining traction.
gamingContent.actionableInsight: Develop content around popular gaming events and collaborate with gaming influencers to tap into this engaged audience.

nostalgia and humor.description: Nostalgic and humorous content, as seen with the 'Scary Movie' franchise, continues to captivate audiences. Videos that explore references or behind-the-scenes content of nostalgic films could be popular.
nostalgia and humor.actionableInsight: Leverage nostalgic themes and humor in content creation to attract viewers who enjoy revisiting past popular culture.

personal stories.description: Content that shares personal experiences, such as 'I Worked The Front Desk At A Motel…', suggests a trend towards storytelling and personal narratives.
personal stories.actionableInsight: Encourage creators to share authentic stories or experiences, which can help build a personal connection with the audience.

high-profileCollaborations.description: Channels like Paramount Pictures and Netflix are leveraging high-profile collaborations and established franchises to attract viewers.
high-profileCollaborations.actionableInsight: Smaller creators might consider collaborations with other creators or brands to increase visibility and reach.

liveStreaming.description: Live streaming content, as demonstrated by 'ARC NUTTERS', is gaining popularity for its interactive and real-time engagement.
liveStreaming.actionableInsight: Creators should explore live streaming as a way to engage directly with their audience and build community.

cross-mediaPromotions.description: Trailers and content that bridge multiple media (e.g., games and movies) are trending. This presents an opportunity for cross-promotional content.
cross-mediaPromotions.actionableInsight: Brands and creators should explore partnerships that allow for cross-promotion between different media types to reach wider audiences.

emergingGenres.description: Genres such as horror-comedy ('Scary Movie 6') and anime adaptations ('ONE PIECE') are showing strong interest.
emergingGenres.actionableInsight: Content creators should consider exploring these genres and creating related content such as reviews, analyses, or discussions to capture audience interest.

regionalContent.description: Although not explicitly detailed, there is potential for regional content to trend, especially if it taps into localized humor or stories.
regionalContent.actionableInsight: Creators should consider producing content that resonates with local or regional audiences, potentially using local dialects or cultural references.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
